products.description: Standard gasketed plate heat exchanger for corrosive fluids.
Heavy duty shell and tube exchanger for high temp application.
Water sealed liquid ring pump for chemical extraction.
Two-stage rotary vane pump for high vacuum synthesis.
High heat transfer efficiency plate heat exchanger.
Dry running screw vacuum pump for oil-free processes.

tickets.description: High temperature cooling jacket gasket leakage on glass lined reactor GLR-200. Slight brown color fluid dripping from flange connection during agitation.
Baseline noise drift and pressure fluctuation exceeding 5 bar during standard runs of tablet assay protocols. Column compartment heating is also inconsistent.
Proportional direction control valve error code E-102. System pressure fails to ramp past 120 bar during the forging stroke, halting the press.

tickets.final_comments: The issue is resolved successfully. The faulty parts are changed and the HE is working properly now.

tickets.description: Vaccum pump not working may have a problem in rotatory fan.
tickets.final_comments: Rotatory fan relaced vacuum pump is working fine now
